In 2022, Jenny Nguyen defied the common refrain “nobody watches women’s sports” and opened the Sports Bra, a Portland, OR bar dedicated to women’s sports. It was no small feat: After being denied business loans, Nguyen used her own savings, a Kickstarter campaign, and loans from friends and family to make it happen. Here’s how she gets it done. - THE CUT
